DarwinFi
HomeBuild StoryProductLaunch DApp

Product Showcase

See DarwinFi in Action

A full-stack DeFi application: ERC-4626 vault, AI-evolved competing strategies, biological AI systems, self-evolving code, and cross-chain expansion. All live on Base mainnet.

DApp Features

Each page exposes a different layer of the living organism.

Live on DApp

Vault Overview

Home

Real-time vault telemetry showing total assets, share price, utilization, and agent status. Deposit and withdraw USDC directly.

  • +Live share price + vault TVL
  • +Agent wallet balance + active strategy
  • +One-click deposit/withdraw with approval flow
  • +Recent trades feed
Live on DApp

Strategy Leaderboard

Tournament

Watch all strategies compete in real time. Ranked by composite fitness score across PnL, Sharpe ratio, win rate, consistency, and drawdown.

  • +Live composite score rankings
  • +Strategy PnL + Sharpe ratio per strategy
  • +Evolution cycle history + genome diffs
  • +Promotion/demotion event timeline
Live on DApp

Your Position

Portfolio

Track your dvUSDC share balance, current value in USDC, and profit/loss since deposit. Withdraw anytime.

  • +dvUSDC share balance + current value
  • +PnL tracking since deposit
  • +Withdraw with lock-time awareness
  • +Emergency withdrawal (always available)
Live on DApp

AI Predictions

Instinct

Multi-source intelligence from a 5-department biological nervous system. Predictions at 4 timeframes, source fitness scoring, and adaptive evolution.

  • +Directional predictions (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h)
  • +Source fitness scores (Grok, RSS, on-chain)
  • +Adaptive evolution triggers
  • +Pattern detection + workflow suggestions
Live on DApp

Cross-Chain Expansion

Frontier

Team 4 sends four new bot archetypes hunting across Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism. Each fills a distinct ecological niche.

  • +Abiogenesis: micro-cap moonshot detection
  • +Mitosis: ultra-HFT micro-scalping
  • +Cambrian: volatility spike hunting
  • +Symbiont: smart money whale following
Live on DApp

Self-Evolution Engine

Evolution

DarwinFi evolves its own source code. Venice AI generates mutations tested in isolated git worktree sandboxes with canary deploy and auto-rollback.

  • +Venice AI (Llama 3.3 70B) code generation
  • +Git worktree sandbox isolation
  • +Canary deploy with performance comparison
  • +Auto-rollback on degradation (18 smoke tests)

Smart Contracts

Deployed and verified on Base mainnet (chain 8453).

DarwinVaultV4 (Security Hardened)

Live

0x4a55DEEC24C6b5c1aa6301b43b4D9680c10491d7

48h timelock on agent/feeRecipient changes, 80% max borrow ratio, 12-decimal shares (6 USDC + 6 offset), 7-day borrow timeout with bad debt write-off. 423+ passing tests.

View on Basescan

DarwinVaultV2 (ERC-4626)

Fallback

0xb01aD1140d7acA150BF56D7516Bd44eE64970FE3

Original ERC-4626 vault. Maintained as fallback if V4 requires migration.

Deployer Wallet

0xb2db53Db9a2349186F0214BC3e1bF08a195570e3

View on Basescan

ENS Identity

darwinfi.base.eth

Fee Structure

Transparent, on-chain, and verifiable. No hidden costs.

Management Fee

1% / year

Accrued continuously based on total vault assets. Collected automatically when the agent returns funds or via manual trigger.

Performance Fee

5% on profits

Only charged on gains above the high-water mark. You are never charged twice on the same profit.

Deposit / Withdrawal

0%

No entry or exit fees. Deposit and withdraw USDC freely (subject to lock time and available liquidity).

On-Chain Verification

All fee parameters are stored in the smart contract and can be verified by anyone. Fee changes require a 48-hour timelock.

Verify on BaseScan ->

Tech Stack

111 source files across 5 layers.

Smart Contracts

SolidityHardhatOpenZeppelin ERC-4626VaultV4 (security hardened)Base Mainnet

Agent Core

TypeScriptethers.js v6Uniswap V3 SDK1inch Aggregator

AI Models

Claude Haiku (signals)Venice AI / Llama 3.3 70B (evolution)Ollama/Gemma2 (local fallback)Grok/X (sentiment)

DApp

ReactViteWagmiRainbowKitTailwind CSS

Infrastructure

PM2ExpressCaddyIPFS/FilecoinBase / Arbitrum / Optimism

Connect your wallet, explore the vault, watch strategies compete. The DApp is live on Base mainnet.

Autonomous, self-evolving DeFi vault. AI strategies compete via Darwinian selection on Base L2. Built for the Synthesis Hackathon.
